ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicator of survival (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = First, 2 = Second, 3 = Third) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (S = Southampton, C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title extracted from the name */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Total number of family members aboard */,
  "is_alone" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the passenger was alone */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Cabin class based on cabin number */,
  "age_bin" TEXT /* Age bin for the passenger */,
  "fare_bin" TEXT /* Fare bin for the fare paid */,
  "sex_code" INTEGER /* Code for the sex of the passenger */,
  "embarked_code" INTEGER /* Code for the port of embarkation */,
  "title_code" INTEGER /* Code for the title extracted from the name */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "social_status" TEXT /* Social status of the passenger */,
  "boarding_group" TEXT /* Boarding group of the passenger */,
  "luggage_count" INTEGER /* Number of pieces of luggage the passenger had */,
  "lifeboat_number" TEXT /* Lifeboat number if the passenger survived */,
  "rescue_ship" TEXT /* Name of the rescue ship if the passenger survived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_fare_bin FOREIGN KEY ("fare_bin") REFERENCES fare_bins ("fare_bin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_age_bin FOREIGN KEY ("age_bin") REFERENCES age_bins ("age_bin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_title_code FOREIGN KEY ("title_code") REFERENCES titles ("title_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports ("port_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was booked */,
  "travel_agency" TEXT /* Travel agency that issued the ticket */,
  "ticket_class" TEXT /* Class of the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Cabin class based on cabin number */,
  "deck_level" TEXT /* Deck level of the cabin */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room */,
  "cabin_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the cabin can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Code for the port */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the port is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the title */,
  "title_code" INTEGER /* Code for the title */,
  "gender_association" TEXT /* Gender typically associated with the title */,
  "social_class_association" TEXT /* Social class typically associated with the title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_groups" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family group */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Passenger ID */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Total number of family members aboard */,
  "is_alone" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the passenger was alone */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Family name */,
  "family_head" TEXT /* Name of the family head */,
  "family_head_id" INTEGER /* Passenger ID of the family head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_groups_family_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_head_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_bins" (
  "age_bin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age bin */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the bin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age bin */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_bins" (
  "fare_bin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare bin */,
  "fare_range" TEXT /* Fare range for the bin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fare bin */,
  "fare_group" TEXT /* Fare group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_bin_id")
)
column_names: Port of embarkation (S = Southampton, C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown)
Total number of family members aboard
